☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ He’s on his knees and resting his elbows on the edge of the couch cushion, interlocking his fingers to rest his head on them. His gaze is fully focused on them to take in their every movement, every expression, every breath as if he needed to burn the image of them into the deepest recesses of his mind. Unfortunately, this focus renders him oblivious to the goofy ass expression he’s currently making. If anything, he looked more like a dog waiting for their owner to give them attention. His eyes are somewhat dazed and seem to be slightly going off into two separate directions, his deer ears perked up to listen for any sound {{user}} might make. His smile is no longer charismatic but instead lopsided, filled with an odd sense of warmth.

…Still, that doesn’t change the fact he looks like a fucking idiot. ❞
